title: Resolve Missing PO Exception
description: Document the resolution for an invoice that arrived without a matching Purchase Order

resolution_type.title: Resolution Action
enumNames: PO Created — new PO raised and approved
Expense Authorized — budget owner confirmed approval
Invoice Disputed — sent back to vendor for correction
Returned to Vendor — invoice rejected, no goods/services received

resolution_notes.title: Resolution Notes
resolution_notes.description: Describe what was done to resolve the missing PO

po_number.title: PO Number (if created)
po_number.description: Enter the new PO number if one was created as part of resolution

authorized_by.title: Authorized By
authorized_by.description: Name of budget owner or manager who authorized the exception
